hero.desc: At DevQueens, we craft exceptional digital experiences. From innovative UI/UX to cutting-edge web and mobile development, we elevate your business to the next level of technology.
home.welcome.desc1: DevQueens is your strategic partner for innovative, scalable, and purpose-driven digital solutions. We specialize in crafting high-impact experiences that not only look exceptional but also perform flawlessly across all platforms.
home.welcome.desc2: With a solid track record of successful projects across industries, our multidisciplinary team blends creativity, technical excellence, and user-centered thinking to bring your vision to life.
home.cards.collaborative.title: Collaborative Approach
home.cards.collaborative.subtitle: Partnership-driven development
home.cards.collaborative.text: We don't just build solutions — we build partnerships. Our collaborative approach ensures every project aligns with your business goals and exceeds expectations.
home.cards.excellence.title: Excellence Recognition
home.cards.excellence.subtitle: Award-winning quality
home.cards.excellence.text: Our commitment to excellence has been recognized with industry awards and client accolades, reflecting the high standards we maintain in every project.
home.services.desc: We offer a comprehensive suite of digital services designed to elevate your brand and accelerate your growth with enterprise-grade solutions and strategic expertise.
home.services.card1.title: Corporate Branding
home.services.card1.content: We create unique visual identities that perfectly reflect your company's mission and values.
home.services.card2.title: Fast Code & Deployment
home.services.card2.content: From concept to launch, we streamline your e-commerce or business website in record time.
home.services.card3.title: Seamless Integration
home.services.card3.content: Build cross-platform mobile apps that deliver native performance and unmatched user experience.
home.services.card4.title: Strategic Guidance
home.services.card4.content: Leverage our expert insights to refine your digital strategy, optimize processes, and boost ROI.
home.about.desc1: Stay ahead of the curve with our carefully curated collection of articles, tutorials, and expert resources. From cutting-edge design trends to development techniques and strategic insights, we provide practical knowledge and thought leadership.
home.about.desc2: Whether you're a designer, developer, or digital strategist, you'll find valuable guidance to sharpen your skills, make informed decisions, and drive meaningful results in your projects.
home.about.stat.text: We combine deep industry expertise with a passion for innovation, delivering resources that empower teams to build better digital products — faster.
home.expertise.desc: From concept to design, we bring strategic know-how and creative solutions to every project. Our team shares actionable insights, proven techniques, and industry best practices.
home.expertise.card1.title: Improving Accessibility in React
home.expertise.card1.content: Learn best practices to ensure your React components are fully accessible and compliant with WCAG standards, creating inclusive digital experiences.
home.expertise.card2.title: Optimizing Performance with Next.js
home.expertise.card2.content: Discover advanced techniques to boost page speed and SEO, from image optimization to smart caching strategies and Core Web Vitals improvement.
home.expertise.card3.title: UI/UX Design Best Practices
home.expertise.card3.content: Explore design principles that create intuitive interfaces and memorable user experiences, backed by research and real-world case studies.
home.expertise.card4.title: SEO Strategies for Modern Web Apps
home.expertise.card4.content: Understand how to structure content, optimize meta tags, and implement technical SEO strategies to improve search rankings and visibility.
home.expertise.card5.title: Innovation & Strategy
home.expertise.card5.content: Drive digital transformation with forward-thinking strategies and innovative solutions that position your brand at the forefront of your industry.
footer.description: We deliver exceptional digital experiences that drive growth and innovation.
footer.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
footer.cta.desc: Let's talk about your next digital project.
services.hero.desc: Boost your business with tailored digital solutions. Explore our services designed to take your brand to the next level.
services.card1.title: Corporate Branding
services.card1.content: We create unique visual identities that reflect your brand essence and connect with your audience.
services.card2.title: Web Development
services.card2.content: We build fast, secure and SEO-optimized websites using the latest technologies.
services.card3.title: Mobile Apps
services.card3.content: We design and develop native and hybrid mobile applications with intuitive UX.
services.card4.title: Digital Consulting
services.card4.content: We advise you on digital strategy, online marketing and technological transformation.
services.card5.title: SEO & Positioning
services.card5.content: We improve your search engine visibility with on-page and off-page SEO techniques.
services.card6.title: UI/UX Design

services.process.step2.title: Design

about.hero.desc: Our mission is to empower businesses through innovative digital solutions that combine technical excellence with creative design. From our founding in 2020, we've grown into a global team of passionate experts dedicated to transforming ideas into impactful digital experiences.
about.story.heading: Our Story
about.story.text: What began as a small team of developers and designers with a shared vision has grown into a full-service digital agency serving clients worldwide. We've delivered over 100 projects across industries including fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, and education. Our approach combines agile methodologies with deep technical expertise, ensuring every solution we build is scalable, maintainable, and aligned with our clients' strategic goals.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.content: To bridge the gap between innovative technology and exceptional user experiences, delivering digital solutions that drive measurable business growth.
about.vision.title: Our Vision
about.vision.content: To become the most trusted technology partner for forward-thinking companies worldwide, setting the standard for quality, creativity, and client satisfaction in digital services.

accountants.hero.desc: We create professional websites designed specifically for accountants. An online presence that reflects your expertise, attracts new clients and positions you as the reference you are in your market.
accountants.why.title: Your Clients Search for You Online. Do They Find You?
accountants.why.stat1.title: Research Online
accountants.why.stat1.text: Of potential clients research online before hiring a professional service.
accountants.why.stat2.title: Trust More
accountants.why.stat2.text: A professional website increases trust and credibility in your accounting service.
accountants.why.stat3.title: More Opportunities
accountants.why.stat3.text: Accountants with an online presence receive up to 3x more inquiries from new clients.
accountants.services.card1.title: Custom Professional Website
accountants.services.card1.content: We design your custom website with clear information about your services, experience and values. Adapted to web and mobile so you look impeccable on any device.
accountants.services.card2.title: Service Catalog
accountants.services.card2.content: Present your accounting services in an organized and professional way. Your clients will understand exactly what you offer and why they should choose you.
accountants.services.card3.title: Marketing Optimization
accountants.services.card3.content: Your website ready for advertising and digital marketing campaigns. Optimized for SEO, Google Ads and social media from day one.
accountants.services.card4.title: Consulting & Support
accountants.services.card4.content: We guide you in every decision. We compare market options, analyze competitors and help you stand out with solid foundations.
accountants.process.title: From First Contact to Your Published Website
accountants.process.step1.title: Free Consultation
accountants.process.step1.text: We discuss your accounting practice, your goals and how you want to present yourself to the world.
accountants.process.step2.title: Custom Design
accountants.process.step2.text: We create design proposals aligned to your identity. You choose or bring your own ideas.
accountants.process.step3.title: Agile Development
accountants.process.step3.text: We build your website with best practices. Fast, secure and optimized for all devices.
accountants.process.step4.title: Launch & Support
accountants.process.step4.text: We publish your site and support you with continuous assistance so everything works perfectly.
accountants.compare.left.title: Without Online Presence
accountants.compare.left.4: Depend solely on word of mouth
accountants.compare.right.title: With DevQueens
accountants.compare.right.2: Ready for Google and social media campaigns
accountants.contact.title: Let's Start Building Your Online Presence
accountants.contact.desc: Leave us your details and we'll contact you for a free consultation. Bring your ideas or we'll propose designs and possibilities. No commitment, just opportunities.

accountants.form.message.placeholder: What services do you offer? Do you have any ideas for your website?
accountants.form.success: Thank you! You will receive your free consultation within the next 24 hours.

accountants.offer.desc: Includes custom design, web and mobile development, basic SEO optimization and initial consulting. Everything you need to get started.

accountants.pack1.desc: Everything essential for your online presence.
accountants.pack2.title: Website + Fanpage + Campaign

accountants.buy.perk1.title: Free Initial Consultation
accountants.buy.perk1.text: We discuss your practice and define the best strategy for your website together.
accountants.buy.perk2.title: Design That Reflects Your Brand
accountants.buy.perk2.text: We create a professional visual identity aligned with your image as an accountant.
accountants.buy.perk3.title: Ready to Grow
accountants.buy.perk3.text: Your site ready to scale with digital marketing whenever you decide.
accountants.form.side.title: Why choose us?
accountants.form.side.2: Custom designs or bring your own
accountants.form.side.3: We guide you in every decision
accountants.form.side.4: Website ready for marketing and advertising
accountants.form.sent.title: Thank you for your interest!
accountants.form.sent.text: We have received your request. We will contact you within 24 hours to schedule your free consultation.
accountants.about.p1: At DevQueens we specialize in creating digital presence for accounting professionals. We understand the unique challenges of your industry: you need to convey trust, experience and professionalism at every touchpoint with your clients.
accountants.about.p2: We combine strategic design, modern web development and digital marketing optimization. We don't just create websites — we build tools that convert visitors into clients and position your accounting practice above the competition.
payment.success.title: Payment Successful!
payment.success.subtitle: Your payment has been processed successfully.
payment.success.steps.title: What happens next?
payment.success.step1.title: We Contact You
payment.success.step1.text: In the next few minutes we'll reach out to confirm your order and get to know you better.
payment.success.step2.title: We Schedule a Meeting
payment.success.step2.text: We'll coordinate a meeting to deeply understand your needs, goals, and the vision you have for your online presence.
payment.success.step3.title: Tailored Proposals
payment.success.step3.text: We'll put tailored web design proposals on the table, focused on attracting users and aligned with your business requirements.
payment.success.step4.title: Development & Creation
payment.success.step4.text: Once you choose the path, we'll create your professional website with best practices and optimized for all devices.
payment.success.step5.title: Ready to Grow
payment.success.step5.text: We leave everything ready for when you want to do digital marketing. Your website will be optimized for campaigns, SEO and social media.
payment.success.step6.title: We're Always With You
payment.success.step6.text: We accompany you in every decision. You won't be alone: we answer your questions and guide you every step of the way.
payment.success.footer: We'll be reaching out to you in the next few minutes. In the meantime, here's what you can expect:
payment.error.title: Payment Error
payment.error.subtitle: There was an issue processing your payment. Please try again.
payment.error.desc: This may be due to a temporary issue with the payment processor or insufficient funds. If the problem persists, feel free to contact us directly.
